top3.sql:
SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM store_sales
JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq = (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1998 AND d_moy = 12 LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name
ORDER BY total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1998 
    AND d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name
ORDER BY 
    total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100
